label: Multi-Agent
description: Concurrent fan-out across N agents via openagentic-proxy. Falls back to direct LLM batch when openagentic-proxy is unavailable.

settings.name: pattern
settings.label: Orchestration pattern
settings.description: How agents collaborate. parallel = fan-out + aggregate. sequential = handoff chain. supervisor = first agent coordinates rest. debate = sequential with pro/con/judge framing.

settings.name: agents
settings.label: Agents
settings.description: Array of agent slots. RECOMMENDED: { agentId } referencing a registered agent from the Admin console. Inline { role, taskDescription, systemPrompt, tools } is supported but bypasses the registry SOT — registered agents inherit tools/prompt/model/memory from prisma.agent.

ai.shortDescription: Run a list of agents concurrently via openagentic-proxy.
ai.whenToUse: When you have N specialized agents that should all process the same input and return aggregated results.
ai.examplePrompt: spawn researcher, fact-checker, and synthesizer agents concurrently on the input topic
ai.promptHints: Reference the merged result with {{steps.<id>.content}} and the per-agent results with {{steps.<id>.agents}}.

outputAssertions.name: multi_agent_count
outputAssertions.errorMessage: No agents executed in the multi-agent run.

outputAssertions.name: multi_agent_majority_succeeded
outputAssertions.expression: result && Array.isArray(result.agents) && result.agents.filter(a => a && (a.status === 'completed' || a.status === 'success' || (!a.error && (a.content || a.output)))).length >= Math.ceil(result.agents.length / 2)
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Less than half of the agents completed successfully — orchestration likely failed.

outputAssertions.name: multi_agent_substantive_output
outputAssertions.expression: !result || !result.content || (result.content.length > 100 && !result.content.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i))
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Multi-agent run produced no substantive output (likely all agents returned 'no info' / refusal responses).
